decisionHints: Rank is quality-first: Mini-LED > QLED/NanoCell > LED; webOS/Tizen > Google TV > Android > basic smart
Best picture under 30k: LG QNED Mini-LED or Samsung Mini-LED M70H
Best OS polish: LG webOS or Samsung Tizen official stores
Value + apps: TCL/Fresh QLED Google TV or Sharp frameless
Dish setup: Tornado/TCL built-in receiver models when satellite boxes matter
65" under 30k exists (LG QNED/NANO, Samsung U8000H, Sharp, Tornado) if seating ≥2.2m
